description: A beginner-friendly fitness companion with mock state, MVUX, and an adaptive shell with a bottom TabBar. Home shows a personalized greeting, today's workout, weekly activity stats, recent results and quick tips. Includes a Plan page (scheduled workouts), a Progress page (completed-workout history), a Profile page, and a guided Workout Session flow. Clean, motivating Material UI.

messages.content:
Generate a beginner-friendly fitness app with:
- mock state
- MVUX
- an adaptive shell with a bottom TabBar
- a clean, motivating Material UI

Home screen:
- a personalized greeting and motivation message
- today's workout card with a Start button
- weekly activity stats (minutes active, calories, completed vs goal days)
- recent workout results
- quick fitness tips

Navigation:
- Home, Plan (scheduled workouts), Progress (completed-workout history) and Profile pages
- a guided Workout Session flow

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (workouts, results, profile)
Here's your **FitStart** app! It's built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Add an exercise details page with navigation

messages.content:
Generate a beginner-friendly fitness app with:
- mock state
- MVUX
- an adaptive shell with a bottom TabBar
- a clean, motivating Material UI

Home screen:
- a personalized greeting and motivation message
- today's workout card with a Start button
- weekly activity stats (minutes active, calories, completed vs goal days)
- recent workout results
- quick fitness tips

Navigation:
- Home, Plan (scheduled workouts), Progress (completed-workout history) and Profile pages
- a guided Workout Session flow

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (workouts, results, profile)

I've created a complete Uno Platform app at FitBeginnerApp/FitBeginnerApp.csproj.

**Key files:**
- FitBeginnerApp/App.xaml
- FitBeginnerApp/App.xaml.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/GlobalUsings.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/ThemeColors.xaml
- FitBeginnerApp/FitBeginnerApp.csproj
- FitBeginnerApp/Models/AppConfig.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/MainPage.xaml
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/MainPage.xaml.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/MainModel.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/HomePage.xaml
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/HomePage.xaml.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/HomeModel.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/PlanPage.xaml
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/PlanPage.xaml.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/PlanModel.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/ProgressPage.xaml
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/ProgressPage.xaml.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/ProgressModel.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/ProfilePage.xaml
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/ProfilePage.xaml.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/ProfileModel.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/WorkoutSessionPage.xaml
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/WorkoutSessionPage.xaml.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/WorkoutSessionModel.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Presentation/SharedTypes.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Platforms/Desktop/Program.cs
- FitBeginnerApp/Platforms/WebAssembly/Program.cs

**Structure:**
- The app uses MVUX (each page has a matching *Model record) and Uno.Extensions.Navigation with attached Regions for page routing.
- MainPage is the adaptive shell: a content area using a visibility-based region navigator (uen:Region.Navigator="Visibility") plus a bottom utu:TabBar wired with uen:Region.Name to Home, Plan, Progress and Profile.
- HomePage shows a greeting, today's workout card, weekly stats, recent results and quick tips, bound to HomeModel. PlanPage lists scheduled workouts, ProgressPage shows completed-workout history, ProfilePage shows the user profile, and WorkoutSessionPage drives a guided session.
- Shared domain records live in SharedTypes.cs: ExerciseItem, WorkoutEntry, WorkoutResult and UserProfile. All data is mock/seeded directly in the *Model records.
- Styling uses Material theme resources and Uno.Toolkit CardContentControl; ThemeColors.xaml defines the palette.

The app is built and running. The user may ask me to modify it.
